ogTitle: Bartle Frere vs Barwidgi: Climate Safety

heading: Bartle Frere vs Barwidgi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bartle Frere, Queensland and Barwidgi, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bartle Frere has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Barwidgi (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bartle Frere or Barwidgi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bartle Frere has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Barwidgi scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bartle Frere scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Barwidgi scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bartle Frere or Barwidgi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bartle Frere has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
